arts.sum: “I don’t want to talk to a newspaper that thinks it’s okay to write like that about another person. The international break was tough for Celtic’s player who was injured on Denmark duty and then slaughtered by a disrespectful journalist for his performance vs Portugal.

arts.sum: The Honduran is on loan in Greece until the end of the season and could yet make the move a longer term one

arts.sum: Predicted Celtic XI: SINISALO, JOHNSTON, CCV, TRUSTY, SCHLUPP, MCGREGOR, ENGELS, BERNARDO, MAEDA, KUHN, IDAH. Of course there have been issues for the boss over the past few weeks with injuries after Kasper Schmeichel hurt himself on international break while Callum McGregor missed Rangers and Auston Trusty was also ruled out.

arts.ttl: Callum McGregor delivers verdict on long-term impact of Scotland retirement
arts.sum: Celtic captain Callum McGregor says retiring from international football has only benefitted him this season.

arts.ttl: Player doesn’t want Celtic stay ‘under any circumstances’ – ‘Mistreated’ by Brendan Rodgers’ side
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers didn’t utilise Luis Palma regularly at Celtic in the first half of this season. The Honduras international was limited to 267 minutes from 12 games and wasn’t pleased with his situation. In the winter market, Celtic let him join Olympiacos on loan until the end of this season. arts.ttl: Matt O'Riley's former mentor sees stunning way back to Celtic
arts.sum: Peter Grant says Celtic should ask Brighton the O’Riley question That’s why he reckons Celtic should 100 percent be on the phone to Brighton to see if a loan stint in the summer might work for all parties as O’Riley simply wants to be on the pitch all the time.

arts.ttl: Celtic warned to avoid repeating 'ridiculous' transfer mistake as summer window nears
arts.sum: Chris Sutton has warned Celtic not to make the same transfer mistake for the second window running and let go of a 'top striker'.
